prompt: Order these art milestones from earliest to latest

events.title: Mona Lisa started

events.title: The Night Watch painted
events.fact: 1642 — Rembrandt completes Dutch Golden Age masterpiece

events.title: Impression, Sunrise painted
events.fact: 1872 — Claude Monet gives name to Impressionism

events.title: The Starry Night painted
events.fact: 1889 — Vincent van Gogh paints work in asylum

events.title: Picasso's Cubist debut
events.fact: 1907 — Les Demoiselles d'Avignon shocks art world

events.title: Persistence of Memory
events.fact: 1931 — Salvador Dalí's melting clocks surrealist work

events.title: Campbell's Soup Cans
events.fact: 1962 — Andy Warhol introduces Pop Art screens
